name: codex-ads
description: Codex-native paid advertising audits, planning, reporting, and creative production with daily upstream compatibility sync.

interface.shortDescription: Audit, plan, and package paid media work inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Ads gives Codex a structured paid-media workflow for audits, budget reviews, reporting, brand DNA extraction, creative briefs, asset prompting, and daily compatibility sync from an upstream reference repository.
defaultPrompt: Run /ads audit on this account export and write the action plan.
Extract brand DNA from this site and generate a campaign brief.
Check for upstream changes and sync Codex Ads.
